h2.t-if: not search_term and not search_slide_category and not search_my and not search_tags and channels

div.t-if: not channels and not search_term and not search_slide_category and not search_my and not search_tags
div.p: Click on "New" in the top-right corner to write your first course.

div.div: No course was found matching your search .
No course was found matching your search.

t.div: No results found for ''. Showing results for ''.

div.t-attf-class: row g-4 g-lg-3 g-xxl-4 #{'row-cols-1 row-cols-sm-2 row-cols-xl-4' if (is_public_user and not has_side_column) else 'row-cols-1 row-cols-sm-2 row-cols-xl-3'}
